title: age-group — product analytics

events.name: Age Group Created
events.description: New AgeGroup row created. `source` explains the entry point (tenant_provisioning / admin_created / legacy_backfill_command).

events.name: Age Group Bounds Changed
events.description: Bounds mutation. Feeds the safeguarding-drift dashboard — bounds changes may invalidate athlete eligibility. `min_age_delta` + `max_age_delta` are numeric (post - pre); `is_youth_flip` signals whether the change crossed the 18-boundary. affected_athlete_count populated from Wave 3+ (Athlete module hooks).

events.name: Age Group Cutoff Changed
events.description: Cutoff mutation. Feeds the same safeguarding-drift dashboard.

events.name: Age Group Default Changed
events.description: Default flag flipped within a (tenant, org, sport_key) tuple. Feeds the tier-pricing-impact dashboard.

events.name: Age Group Archived
events.description: had_inbound_rows is boolean — signals whether the caller used --force to bypass the FK check.

events.name: Age Group Quota Exceeded
events.description: Attempt to create a custom AgeGroup beyond the slot cap. Feeds the upsell funnel — Medium-tier tenants filling the 20-group cap are prime Enterprise upgrade candidates.

events.name: Age Group Custom Disabled
events.description: Small-tier tenant attempted to create a custom age group. Feeds the Small → Medium upsell funnel — signals a tenant that has outgrown the seeded catalog.

events.name: Age Group Sport Specific Disabled
events.description: Non-Enterprise tenant attempted to set sport_key. Feeds the Medium → Enterprise upsell funnel.

events.name: Age Group Resolved
events.description: Resolver endpoint called. outcome: matched / indeterminate / not_found. candidate_count > 1 with outcome='indeterminate' signals a tenant catalog with overlapping bounds — a data-quality signal.

events.name: Age Group Catalog Seeded
events.description: Fires on TenantProvisioned + on legacy-backfill runs + on reconciler re-seeds. catalog_version helps distinguish catalog generations across the tenant fleet.

events.name: Age Group Reconciler Auto-Healed
events.description: heal_action: promote_oldest / demote_extras. drift_kind: zero_default / multiple_default. Fed by ReconcileAgeGroupDefaultInvariantJob.

notes: age_group_id is ULID (`age_*`) — an anonymised identifier. No PII risk.
The AgeGroup row carries no PII — bounds + cutoff are reference data. No `identify` calls happen in this module.
`affected_athlete_count` (Wave 3+) is a NUMERIC count only — never a list of athlete IDs. Athlete rows carry minor PII; this module never emits Athlete identifiers in analytics events.
